parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: 'Write a short, friendly email asking a customer to leave a Google review after their service was completed. Keep it under 80 words. Be genuine, not salesy.

Customer name: ' + $json.body.customer_name + '
Service completed: ' + $json.body.service_completed + '
Completion date: ' + ($json.body.completion_date || 'today') + '
Business name: ' + ($json.body.business_name || 'our business') + '
Google review link: ' + ($json.body.review_link || '[REVIEW_LINK]') + '

Respond in JSON: {"subject": "...", "body": "...", "send_delay_hours": 24}' }] }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'review_request_email', recipient: $json.body.customer_email, customer_name: $json.body.customer_name, subject: $json.subject, draft: $json.body_text, send_delay_hours: $json.send_delay_hours, requires_approval: true }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, status: 'review_request_queued', customer: $json.body.customer_name, scheduled_send: $json.send_delay_hours + ' hours' }) }}
